source: aced.gg dev blog 2021-05-23 (designer Shmitty) — DOCUMENTED design write-up, no live footage exists
map: Graveyard biome: dark dirt/moss ground with BONES, TOMBSTONES, trees, and glowing 'SOUL CRACKS' in the ground (spooky graveyard). Noisy/heavily-textured + anti-aliased art style. Darker-dirt tiles have no blend. Many object variants.

bosses.name: Tombstone Carrier (ToDD boss/Lord)
bosses.note: CONFIRMED boss = the Tombstone Carrier (per Dragons/Midgame post: 'Tomb of Decaying Death - where you'll find yourself fighting against the Tombstone Carrier for the titular tomb'). A returning legacy enemy, now a zombie. Earlier 'Lord of Decaying Death' guess was WRONG.

minions: The Revealed Remains (counterpart of Buried Hand)
The Tombstone Carrier (returning from legacy ROTF, now a zombie — drops loot when killed, classic tomb-robber)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED (dev blog): ToDD is a returning legacy dungeon. Biome = eldritch graveyard. Enemies are a bone+zombie mix that CRAWL, SPRINT, and sometimes FLOAT (varied movement AI). Roster: Rotten Corpse, Brain Craver, Buried Hand + Revealed Remains pair, Spoilt Flesh, Tombstone Carrier. Same designer also made Nyx of Fire, Soul Harvest, Legendary/Primal items. ALSO REVEALED: a separate unshown dungeon 'Twilight Necropolis' exists.
uncertain: No map layout, boss fight pattern, taunts, or drops in this post (art/biome-design focused). Boss name 'Lord of Decaying Death' inferred. This is the BEST source for ToDD — no video footage exists (verified).
confidence: HIGH for biome + enemy roster + boss NAME (Tombstone Carrier, DOCUMENTED across 2 posts); LOW for fight/map/drops.
